title: Notification No.28/2003-Cus(NT), dated 23.04.2003
text: 23rd April, 2003 Notification No. 28/2003 - Customs ( N.T ) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Kandla to act as Commissioner of Customs, Chennai, or, as the case may be, Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Mumbai, for the purposes of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notices issued vide No. DRI/AZU/INV-12/2000, dated, the 9th August, 2002 by Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi, No. DRI/AZU/INV-12/2000/Mumbai, dated, the 27th August, 2002, by Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai and No. DRI/AZU/INV-12/2000/Kandla, dated, the 27th August, 2002, by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai, to M/s. Adani Exports Limited, Asia Home, Swastik Char Rasta, Ahmedabad. D.S.Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India Ph.No.23094610 F.NO.437/1/2003-CUS.IV -- 1 of 1 --
